scenario_a.label: Scenario A — File SAR, freeze accounts
scenario_a.timeline: SAR filed within 30 days of detection

scenario_b.label: Scenario B — Enhanced monitoring, 30-day EDD
scenario_b.risk: late SAR filing penalty if structuring continues during the 30-day window
scenario_b.timeline_risk: EDD 30-day window plus 60-day FinCEN exam — tight overlap
